a:r.a:t: Focused on strategic product development, global leadership, and high-tech innovation

Product leader with over 10 years of experience bridging the gap between high-level engineering execution and AI-driven product strategy. Specialist in transforming complex operational needs into scalable, data-driven solutions. Proven track record in leading GenAI/NLP POCs from concept to large-scale deployment, while maintaining a systems-level perspective on cloud architecture and cross-functional integration."
Managed delivery of multiple platform initiatives; introduced Agile frameworks that reduced time‑to‑market by 20% and increased execution predictability.
Led global development and external UX partners; aligned stakeholders, budgets, and timelines to meet business goals.
Set data‑driven KPIs; improved engagement and retention.
Grew adoption +22% QoQ; revenue +15% via focused delivery.
Exec. QA Manager - Led QA and compliance for medical food/device products.
Managed pharma regulatory submissions and documentation.
Defined and executed roadmap for an AI‑powered interactive video SaaS; raised $2.5M seed funding.
Led cross‑functional teams (engineering, design, QA, data) to ship multi‑platform releases across Web, Mobile, and Smart‑TV under Agile.
Drove experimentation and feature iteration using analytics and product telemetry; improved user engagement/retention via smarter on‑video interactions and flows.
Built partnerships with enterprise clients and tech vendors;
Advise startups on AI product strategy, from problem discovery to prototype. Companies:

Translate customer problems into GenAI opportunities; frame hypotheses, define success metrics, and run lean experiments/prototypes to validate UX and impact. Collaborate with founders/engineering on model usage patterns (APIs, orchestration), data pipelines, and evaluation loops to improve quality, latency, and cost.
